caption: A man wearing a white traditional robe and a dark patterned cap sits in a chair against a dark brown background. To his right, an on-screen graphic displays "ON THE PHONE" above the name "OLUSOLA OYEKANMI," identified as a "POLITICAL ANALYST" from "LAGOS," alongside a small portrait of a man in a red cap. At the top left of the screen, a "plustv" logo is visible. A purple banner at the bottom contains the text "PLUS POLITICS" and the headline "NIGERIA NEEDS ME – BOLA TINUBU." The bottom of the screen features a white bar with various links and logos; in the top half, it lists "WATCH ONLINE" and "WWW.PLUSTVAFRICA.COM/LIVE-TV" alongside "SUBSCRIBE" and "WWW.YOUTUBE.COM/PLUSTVAFRICA LIFESTYLE," while the bottom half displays "WATCH ON" with "DStv CH 408" and "StarTimes CH 308" and "SUBSCRIBE" with "WWW.YOUTUBE.COM/PLUSTVAFRICA." Throughout the frames, the man remains seated, slightly shifting his head and speaking.
